summary: Iteration 30 - Program Detail Page Template feature testing COMPLETE. All features verified: Admin Panel Page Headers tab shows 'FLAGSHIP PROGRAM PAGES — SHARED TEMPLATE' section with 6 style controls + Hero Background + Gold Line Color pickers. Template styles persist via API and apply consistently across all program detail pages (/program/1, /program/2, /program/5). Static page headers (home, services, contact, etc.) continue working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ProgramDetailPage.jsx: Correctly reads template from settings.page_heroes.program_template (line 210)
ProgramDetailPage.jsx: applyStyle() function properly merges template styles with defaults
ProgramDetailPage.jsx: heroAccent and heroBg derived from template.accent_color and template.hero_bg
PageHeadersTab.jsx: TEMPLATE_STYLE_KEYS array defines all 6 style controls (title_style, subtitle_style, section_title_style, section_subtitle_style, body_style, cta_style)
PageHeadersTab.jsx: program_template stored within page_heroes dict via updateHero('program_template', field, value)
site_settings.py: PUT endpoint correctly updates nested page_heroes.program_template object
seed_data_creation: None - used existing programs 1, 2, 5 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program template feature fully implemented. Template stored at settings.page_heroes.program_template. All flagship program detail pages share this single template for styling (title, subtitle, section titles, body text, CTA, accent colors). Static page headers remain independent. Old per-program keys (program_1 through program_6) exist in DB but are no longer used.
